name: cortex-plugin-pr-review
description: Automated PR code review — analyze diffs, check for bugs, security issues, and style violations, then comment inline with fix suggestions
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: review_pr
tools.description: Perform a comprehensive code review on a GitHub pull request. Analyzes the diff for bugs, security vulnerabilities, style issues, and performance concerns. Can post inline comments and a summary review.

params.name: post_comments
params.description: Whether to post review comments to the PR (default: false, dry-run)

tools.name: analyze_diff
tools.description: Analyze a raw git diff for issues. Useful for local changes or when a PR URL is not available.

params.name: diff
params.description: Raw git diff content to analyze

params.name: language
params.description: Primary programming language of the diff (helps rule selection)

tools.name: check_security
tools.description: Deep security analysis of a diff or file contents. Checks for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, hardcoded secrets, unsafe patterns, and dependency risks.

params.name: content
params.description: Code content to analyze for security issues

params.name: file_path
params.description: Path of the file being analyzed (helps with language detection)

tools.name: check_style
tools.description: Check code for style and best practice violations based on the detected language conventions.

params.name: content
params.description: Code content to check for style issues

params.name: language
params.description: Programming language (typescript, python, go, rust, etc.)

tools.name: suggest_fixes
tools.description: Generate specific fix suggestions for issues found in a code snippet. Returns diff-ready patches.

params.name: code_snippet
params.description: The code snippet that needs fixing

params.name: issue_description
params.description: Description of the issue to fix

tools.name: review_checks
tools.description: List or run the available review check categories (bugs, security, style, performance, complexity).

params.name: categories
params.description: Comma-separated categories to run (only when action is 'run')

fields.label: GitHub Token
fields.description: GitHub personal access token for PR API access and posting comments

fields.label: Auto-Approve Threshold
fields.description: Automatically approve PRs when findings are below this severity

fields.label: Max Files Per Review
fields.description: Maximum number of changed files to review in a single PR

tools: Claude Code (Anthropic) — initial scaffold and implementation
